title: MerchantGraph
description: Canonical merchant identities tying together rewards, subscriptions, tax tagging, and shopping (FR-CORE-002, umbrella Key Entities). Provided by Module 0 to all modules. The graph is SHARED, profile-agnostic reference data EXCEPT for email-sourced / user-sourced enrichment, which is profile-scoped: an email_inferred or user node carries owner_profile_id so the FR-X-013 email-revocation purge can target exactly that profile's enrichment (T053/T057). Curated/provider/model reference nodes are owner_profile_id = null and are not profile-scoped.

display_name_fr.description: Localized display name; a node surfaced to users with only one language is a bilingual defect (Constitution II).

category.description: Primary canonical category for this merchant.

aliases.description: Raw descriptors normalized onto this node (dedup/normalization inputs).

parent_merchant_id.description: For brand→subsidiary relationships in the graph.

source.description: Provenance. email_inferred nodes/enrichments are subject to the FR-X-013 deletion cascade on email revocation.

email_sourced.description: true if this node or its enrichment was derived SOLELY from an email source; such data is purged within the 7-day window on email-access revocation regardless of which store holds it (FR-X-013). When true, owner_profile_id MUST be set so the purge can target the owning profile.

owner_profile_id.description: Owning profile for PROFILE-SCOPED enrichment (email_inferred / user nodes). null for shared curated/provider/model reference nodes. The email-revocation purge cascade (FR-X-013, T053/T057) keys on this to remove exactly the revoking profile's email-sourced enrichment without touching shared reference data; profile-scoped nodes are authZ-checked on cross-user reads (threat model IDOR).
